requests.description: Returns Tweets from the last 7 days that match a search query.

requests.name: Filtered stream
requests.description: Streams Tweets matching the stream's active rule set.

requests.name: Rules lookup
requests.description: Returns rules from a User's active rule set. Users can fetch all of their rules or a subset, specified by the provided rule ids.

requests.name: Add/Delete rules
requests.description: Add or delete rules from a User's active rule set. Users can provide unique, optionally tagged rules to add. Users can delete their entire rule set or a subset specified by rule ids or values.

requests.name: Tweet delete by Tweet ID
requests.description: Delete specified Tweet (in the path) by ID.

requests.description: Returns a variety of information about the Tweet specified by the requested ID.

requests.description: Returns a list of Users that have liked the provided Tweet ID

requests.name: Returns User objects that have retweeted the provided Tweet ID
